name: Martin Drew
abstract: Martin Drew (11 February 1944 – 29 July 2010) was an English jazz drummer who played with Ronnie Scott between 1975 and 1995 and with Oscar Peterson between 1974 and 2007.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Oscar Peterson
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Laurence Juber
about_quotes.evidence: I found myself on the bandstand at 13 years old with musicians that were professional level players. In fact the drummer, Martin Drew, was a huge Oscar Peterson fan.
about_quotes.doc_title: Laurence Juber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Glasgow, Scotland, July 27, 2016 [interview 1 of 2]
